responsibilities: Design integrated urban infrastructure plans encompassing roadways, utilities, and stormwater systems for municipal projects
Coordinate with utility providers to align water, sewer, electrical, and telecommunications infrastructure within public rights-of-way
Develop streetscape and complete streets designs that balance vehicular, pedestrian, and cyclist infrastructure needs
Prepare land use and zoning compliance documentation to support urban redevelopment and infill development projects
Collaborate with city planners and community stakeholders to align infrastructure designs with long-term urban growth strategies
Conduct feasibility studies for smart city technologies such as connected lighting, sensors, and traffic management systems
Prepare permit applications and present infrastructure designs at public hearings and municipal review board meetings
Evaluate sustainable and resilient infrastructure alternatives to reduce environmental impact and improve climate adaptability
